zh.title: Human Tokenizer
zh.tagline: 把你的工作，换算成大模型的 token 账单
zh.input_label: ① 投喂你的工作产出
zh.input_placeholder: 把你今天写的日报、周报、PRD、代码、邮件、道歉信……粘贴到这里
zh.upload_hint: 支持代码 / md / csv 等文本文件；PDF、Word、图片 V2 再见
zh.files_added: 已读入 {n} 个文件，共 {c} 字符
zh.file_skipped: 已跳过 {name}（非文本类或超过 2MB）
zh.result_chars: {c} 字符 · 基准 tokenizer: o200k_base
zh.section_api_note: 按输出 token 计价 · 带 * 为估算价
zh.section_plans_note: 官方不公开额度，以下为娱乐向估算
zh.duel_hint: 填上月薪，看看你比模型贵多少
zh.duel_expensive: 你比 {model} 贵 {x} 倍——但你不能并发，还要交社保。
zh.duel_mid: 你比 {model} 贵 {x} 倍。建议在简历里增加「支持上下文超过 1M」。
zh.duel_close: 警惕：你的单价只比 {model} 高 {x} 倍，性价比正在逼近 API。
zh.duel_cheaper: 恭喜，你比 {model} 还便宜。这不是效率，这是剥削，快去要求涨薪。
zh.plan_line: 一个 {window} 小时窗口额度的 {pct}
zh.plan_line_msgs: 一个 {window} 小时窗口的 {pct}（按每条 {avg} tokens 折算）
zh.plan_unlimited: 额度近乎无限，就像你的加班。
zh.hours_cost_line: 按月薪折算，这份产出的人力成本约 {cost}
zh.empty_hint: 先粘贴点什么，哪怕是你的辞职信草稿。
zh.footer_note: 所有价格数据均标注来源与日期，估算值已标明。本工具为讽刺作品：token 度量不了你的价值——但你老板可能也度量不了。页面配色仅为致敬，与各厂商无关。
zh.step_bill_cap: ② 这活儿如果让 AI 干

en.title: Human Tokenizer
en.tagline: Convert your work into an LLM token bill
en.input_placeholder: Paste today's status report, PRD, code, emails, or that apology letter...
en.upload_hint: Text files only (code / md / csv). PDF, Word, images: V2.
en.section_api_note: Priced as output tokens · * = estimated price
en.section_plans_note: Official quotas are unpublished — playful estimates below
en.section_duel: ③ Human vs. model price duel
en.duel_hint: Enter your salary to see how much pricier you are
en.duel_expensive: You cost {x}× more than {model} — but you can't run in parallel, and you need dental.
en.duel_mid: You cost {x}× more than {model}. Consider adding "1M+ context window" to your resume.
en.duel_close: Warning: you're only {x}× pricier than {model}. Your price-performance is converging with the API.
en.duel_cheaper: Congrats, you're cheaper than {model}. That's not efficiency, that's exploitation. Ask for a raise.
en.plan_unlimited: Quota nearly unlimited. Like your overtime.
en.hours_cost_line: At your salary, this piece of work cost about {cost} in human labor
en.card_footer: human-tokenizer · how many tokens are you worth?
en.empty_hint: Paste something first. Even a draft of your resignation letter.
en.footer_note: All prices carry sources and dates; estimates are labeled. This is satire: tokens can't measure your worth — but then again, neither can your boss. Color themes are homage only, unaffiliated with any vendor.
en.step_bill_cap: ② If an AI did this job
